headline: TeraWulf’s stock surges after a $19 billion deal with Anthropic
detail: This mega-deal signals strong investor confidence and capital flow into the AI sector. It's a positive backdrop for your tech and chip holdings, reinforcing growth narratives.

headline: Microsoft cuts 4,800 jobs, as Xbox unit downsizes and plans to spin off four gaming studios
